nodes.name: 须苇莺
nodes.summary: 须苇莺（Moustached warbler，学名 Acrocephalus (bird) melanopogon），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于阿拉伯半岛、劍橋郡，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

nodes.name: 劍橋郡
nodes.summary: 劍橋郡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括彩鹮、须苇莺，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 阿拉伯半岛
nodes.summary: 阿拉伯半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联45种鸟类，包括Harlequin quail、Arabian partridge、Arabian bustard等45种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: South-west European birds are resident, south-east European birds winter in the Mediterranean breeding range, and the Asiatic race migrates to Arabia, India and Pakistan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There have been a few reports from Great Britain, including a pair breeding in Cambridgeshire in 1946, but these records have recently been removed from the official list of British birds, being unconvincingly distinguished from sedge warblers or paddyfield warblers. It is found in upright aquatic vegetation such as reeds and sedge. thumb|Song Scarlino marsh, Italy thumb thumb|Eggs, Collection Museum Wiesbaden

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: There have been a few reports from Great Britain, including a pair breeding in Cambridgeshire in 1946, but these records have recently been removed from the official list of British birds, being unconvincingly distinguished from sedge warblers or paddyfield warblers. It is found in upright aquatic vegetation such as reeds and sedge. thumb|Song Scarlino marsh, Italy thumb thumb|Eggs, Collection Museum Wiesbaden
